'''jachoro''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ldg|ldg]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-ch-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ldg|ldg]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| jachoro
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jæchereth|jæchereth]] || [[word:jæcherej|jæcherej]] || [[word:jæcheresh|jæcheresh]] || [[word:jæchere|jæchere]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:jachochoroth|jachochoroth]] || [[word:jachochoroj|jachochoroj]] || [[word:jachochorosh|jachochorosh]] || [[word:jachochoro|jachochoro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:jachoroth|jachoroth]] || [[word:jachoroj|jachoroj]] || [[word:jachorosh|jachorosh]] || [[word:jachoro|jachoro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:jachofroth|jachofroth]] || [[word:jachofroj|jachofroj]] || [[word:jachofrosh|jachofrosh]] || [[word:jachofrof|jachofrof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jachorotho|jachorotho]] || [[word:jachorojo|jachorojo]] || [[word:jachorosho|jachorosho]] || [[word:jachoroko|jachoroko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jachoroth|jachoroth]] || [[word:jachoroj|jachoroj]] || [[word:jachorosh|jachorosh]] || [[word:jachoro|jachoro]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jachorothol|jachorothol]] || [[word:jachorojol|jachorojol]] || [[word:jachoroshol|jachoroshol]] || [[word:jachorokol|jachorokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jachorothotho|jachorothotho]] || [[word:jachorojojo|jachorojojo]] || [[word:jachoroshosho|jachoroshosho]] || [[word:jachoroko|jachoroko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jachorothon|jachorothon]] || [[word:jachorojon|jachorojon]] || [[word:jachoroshon|jachoroshon]] || [[word:jachorokon|jachorokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jachorothoro|jachorothoro]] || [[word:jachorojoro|jachorojoro]] || [[word:jachoroshoro|jachoroshoro]] || [[word:jachorokoro|jachorokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|06f9dc6}}
